programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Esposito is among subway passengers taken hostage by a mysterious gunman, leaving Castle, Beckett and the team to uncover the assailant's agenda.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The star of Castle's favorite '80s action film is murdered; a team of aging action heroes helps Castle and Beckett investigate.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle and Beckett discover an ER doctor who was gunned down in the street was a mob doctor to a mafia family with ties to Castle; Esposito and Lanie reach an important moment in their relationship.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Unable to work alongside Kate or the 12th Precinct, Castle gets his private investigator license and shows up unannounced at a crime scene.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Have Thinning Hair? Keranique Can Help Regrow Beautiful, Thicker Hair!
programme.desc: If you have thinning hair or hair loss, Keranique can help regrow thicker, longer and fuller hair. Keranique is the number 1 hair regrowth system for women. Regain your confidence with beautiful, thicker and fuller hair in just 3 easy steps!

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Dr. Creflo Dollar ministers to people from all backgrounds with hopes for change; Creflo helps viewers find ways to renew their faith, mind, and spirit; based on the belief that the Bible is the written and inspired Word of God, the show is meant to invoke change in the lives of people across the globe; Creflo and his wife, Taffi, share their vision for everyone to hear the Word and gain understanding of God's love and promises.

programme.title: Life Today With James Robison
programme.desc: James Robison is a former preacher who changed directions in his life several years ago and began hosting this television show alongside his wife, Betty, in order to reach out to help more people. This daily religious and self-help program welcomes guests who tell how they have successfully overcome difficulties in their lives by following God's word -- with the hope of encouraging others to do the same and look to God for help and guidance in times of need. The Robisons provide viewers with Bible-based advice to help them deal with everyday problems.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Noted for her humanitarian ministry efforts to aid suffering people around the world, Bible teacher Joyce Meyer reaches out to both Christians and non-Christians as she illustrates how to make each day better by applying biblical principles to every activity.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: McCall races to find a woman kidnapped by a serial killer whose past crimes went undetected because the victims were from marginalized communities; trouble arises for McCall when her vigilante activity puts her on a district attorney's radar.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: The daughter of McCall's deceased CIA mentor is pursued by a hit squad in France; Aunt Vi becomes suspicious when McCall skips out on another family night for work.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: McCall races to help a concerned wife locate her husband before he helps an extremist group carry out a bombing in the city; McCall worries that her anonymity will be compromised when Delilah asks her to participate in a social media video.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: The search for a missing boy leads the team into the middle of a dangerous drug war between two rival gangs.

Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Nolan and Celina must stand guard at a hospital after a dangerous prisoner needs surgery; Aaron, Lopez and Harper look into a string of robberies; Tim and Lucy consider how their secret relationship will affect their work; Lopez gets unexpected news.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: In the midst of a heatwave and a citywide blackout, Nolan and Aaron follow increasingly large leads after they discover criminals hiding at the station; Chen makes an alarming discovery after being called to a scene with a pungent smell.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Beckett and the team investigate the death of a young telenovela actress; Castle is hired as a private investigator to look into the murder from another angle.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: A woman hires Castle to see if her husband is cheating on her -- but things take a shocking turn when Castle witnesses the murder of his client.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle is asked to consult on a case when evidence in a young woman's murder implicates Dr. Kelly Neiman (Annie Wersching) -- Castle and Beckett's nemesis.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: The stakes are raised as the 12th precinct tries to stop Dr. Kelly Nieman and Jerry Tyson -- also known as 3XK -- before they claim another victim.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: An astronaut is killed inside a Mars simulation; Castle and Beckett make a discovery that results in a shocking turn in the case.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Officer John Nolan and Bailey search for a mystery gunman after a shooting hits a little too close to home; Aaron struggles to live within his means; Wesley suspects that a judge is taking bribes.

Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: With help from the FBI, Lopez puts everything on the line to help Elijah Stone take down a gang leader in exchange for her safety; Nolan and Bailey must deal with the secrets and shady dealings his late mother left behind.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: The team must stop a militia from detonating a highly combustible truck in their possession; Nolan, Thorson, Juarez and Harper search for three men who may have been exposed to Ebola.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Now that Elijah and Abril have become allies, the team must rely on Monica, Elijah's lawyer, to uncover their plans; Officers Nolan and Juarez reopen her sister's case and discover a discrepancy that leads them on a new trail.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: When Dim goes missing, Officer Chen and Sgt. Bradford, along with the CIA, set out to find him and enlist the help of Juicy.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Dr. Creflo Dollar ministers to people from all backgrounds with hopes for change; Creflo helps viewers find ways to renew their faith, mind, and spirit; based on the belief that the Bible is the written and inspired Word of God, the show is meant to invoke change in the lives of people across the globe; Creflo and his wife, Taffi, share their vision for everyone to hear the Word and gain understanding of God's love and promises.

programme.title: Life Today With James Robison
programme.desc: James Robison is a former preacher who changed directions in his life several years ago and began hosting this television show alongside his wife, Betty, in order to reach out to help more people. This daily religious and self-help program welcomes guests who tell how they have successfully overcome difficulties in their lives by following God's word -- with the hope of encouraging others to do the same and look to God for help and guidance in times of need. The Robisons provide viewers with Bible-based advice to help them deal with everyday problems.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Noted for her humanitarian ministry efforts to aid suffering people around the world, Bible teacher Joyce Meyer reaches out to both Christians and non-Christians as she illustrates how to make each day better by applying biblical principles to every activity.

programme.title: Military Makeover
programme.desc: The team joins forces with construction and design to put the finishing touches on the home. We discuss the importance of home maintenance, termite protection and safe pool care. The family comes home for an unforgettable surprise!

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Both sides of McCall's life converge when her daughter Delilah and her school friends are threatened by a European crime syndicate for being eyewitnesses to the outfit's execution of a drug cartel boss.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Just as McCall considers quitting, she's pulled back in when she takes on Detective Marcus Dante as a new client who needs her help to find an untraceable group of bank robbers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: McCall is in the crosshairs of a foreign government's intelligence agency after a diplomat's daughter seeks her help to find her missing brother; Dante faces suspicion from a fellow detective tasked to find the vigilante known as the Equalizer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: The team investigates a pattern of kidnappings, which leads them to a discovery that hits close to home with one of their own; Lucy and Tim's relationship is put to the test as they begin to feel the hard hours of their jobs.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Officer Tim Bradford's ex-wife returns and asks the team to help her save someone from her undercover past; Isabel's return also creates additional pressure in Lucy and Tim's relationship as they assist in the search.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Officer Lucy Chen goes undercover to infiltrate an illegal firearm operation; Detective Harper and Officer John Nolan work together to solve a mystery involving severed limbs found around the city.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: A competitive detective from Hong Kong with information on a murder victim teams up with Beckett and Castle; Beckett discovers information that implies the detective -- and the murder victim -- may not be what they seem.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Detective Ryan ends up in the middle of an assassination plot when he is on the security detail of a charismatic congressman; Castle and Beckett help Ryan investigate.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Beckett and Castle are faced with a large list of possible suspects when a personal injury attorney known as Richie Falco is murdered; a shocking secret deepens the mystery surrounding Richie's death.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Two mercenaries are found dead on Gibbs' boat; Gibbs must consider his former mentor in a new light.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team helps Vance face his demons while uncovering a complex relationship with a killer that endangers his family.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team's investigation into a lieutenant's death is connected to a citywide blackout.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Thanksgiving plans are put on hold while the team investigates the horrific death of a Marine.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When the enlisted son of a preacher, who was a colonel, is found dead, the team thinks he may be the victim of a hate crime; Gibbs' father visits for the holidays.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a Navy pilot is found dead in a secluded area, the team must battle a no-nonsense attorney with a hidden agenda.
